projects.title: Recipe Sharing System
projects.description: Developed a full-stack recipe platform where I implemented features for creating, updating, and deleting recipes, along with user interactions such as favorites, ratings, and reviews with replies. Designed and integrated REST APIs using NestJS and managed relational data with PostgreSQL, while building a responsive UI with Next.js.
projects.tagline: Community-first recipe platform with structured content workflows, ratings, and review conversations.

features.title: Recipe Publishing Flow
features.description: Created full CRUD flows for recipes with clean API contracts and responsive front-end handling.

features.title: Rich User Interactions
features.description: Added favorites, ratings, and threaded review replies to make the platform feel active and social.

features.title: Relational Data Design
features.description: Modeled connected recipe, review, and user data in PostgreSQL for reliable querying and updates.

projects.title: Movie Ticket Booking System
projects.description: Built a real-time movie booking application where I implemented seat selection with Socket.io to ensure synchronized availability across users. Developed backend APIs using Node.js/Express, handled authentication with JWT, and created admin functionalities for managing movies, schedules, and bookings.
projects.tagline: Real-time cinema booking experience with synchronized seat selection and operational admin tooling.

features.title: Live Seat Availability
features.description: Used Socket.io to keep seat states synchronized across users during active booking sessions.

features.title: Secure Admin Workflows
features.description: Implemented JWT-based authentication and protected dashboards for movies, schedules, and bookings.

features.title: Booking Operations
features.description: Structured APIs and database flows to support the full reservation lifecycle from browsing to checkout.

projects.title: E-Tutoring System
projects.description: Worked on the frontend of an admin dashboard where I developed interfaces for managing students, teachers, and staff, and implemented features for assigning teachers to students using Next.js.
projects.tagline: Administrative dashboard experience designed for education workflows and staff coordination.

features.title: Operations Dashboard UI
features.description: Built clean interfaces for handling students, teachers, and staff records inside a structured admin environment.

features.title: Assignment Flows
features.description: Implemented teacher-to-student assignment interactions with clarity around form actions and status handling.

features.title: Scalable Front-End Patterns
features.description: Used reusable Next.js patterns to keep the dashboard maintainable as features expanded.

projects.title: Restaurant Food Ordering System
projects.description: Developed a multi-panel restaurant management system that streamlines order handling, kitchen workflows, and inventory control. Built features for waiters to manage tables and orders, kitchen staff to process requests, and admins to handle inventory and suppliers.
projects.technologies: HTML, CSS, Bootstrap, jQuery, Laravel, MySQL
projects.tagline: End-to-end restaurant workflow system connecting service, kitchen operations, and inventory management.

features.title: Waiter Ordering Panel
features.description: Enabled waiters to select tables, add menu items, and place orders efficiently with a user-friendly interface.

features.title: Kitchen Processing System
features.description: Built a real-time workflow for kitchen staff to view, manage, and update order statuses for smooth food preparation.

features.title: Inventory & Supplier Management
features.description: Implemented admin features for managing raw materials, tracking stock, and handling supplier purchases and manufacturing processes.
